LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.0.label: sense of life (faint)
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.0.description: A faint pain can be felt. True sensation still lies far away.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.1.label: sense of life (minor)
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.1.description: A piercing pain runs through me. It does not feel bad.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.2.label: sense of life (moderate)
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.2.description: A gouging pain makes my body tremble with delight.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.3.label: sense of life (severe)
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Pain.stages.3.description: I am drenched in blood now! This must be what it means to truly live!
